title: 'Veg Alp' gourmet culinary products
description: The MOVING reference member state of this VC (Value Chain) is SWITZERLAND 1. The reference MOVING Card ID of this VC is VC 20 CH1. Veg Alp is an initiative of gourmet chefs in Grisons who experiment with local flavors, breeds and species to create luxury foods for restaurants and private customers. For example, they make 'soy sauce' from barley or treat vegetables like traditional dried meat to cater to a vegan audience.

title: Innovation
description: The type of innovation of this VC (Value Chain) is Endogenous and Exogenous. focuses solely on vegan production in an alpine context, where this area is traditionally perceived as animal based production.
